a.xlink:title: Releases all resources associated with the game and frees the handle.
Executes one frame of the game (input -> update -> render).
Handles skin selection via mouse clicks on preview rectangles or number keybinds.
Draws the skin selection menu overlay when open.
Draws all static platforms in the lobby world.
Draws the player character in the lobby.
Draws the skin-menu toggle button (usually an icon in a corner).
Toggles the skin selection menu visibility.
Updates player position, velocity, angle, jump state, and performs collisions.
Returns the full source rectangle of a texture ({0, 0, w, h}).
Returns the local offset from the top-left of the collision box to its center.
Computes the axis-aligned bounding box that fully encloses the player's circle.
Resolves collision between player's circle and a single axis-aligned rectangle.
